productName: Stingers - 5pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - White Widow - 2.5g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of White Widow supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of woody, earthy, and flowery, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
